outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX (-7.57B) accelerates volatility. Spot far above gamma flip indicates deep acceleration territory.
outlook.summary: Market is in a short gamma regime (Total GEX -7.57B), amplifying price movements. Bearish skew (1.36) and high PCR (1.24-2.30) confirm downside pressure. Spot (668.23) is trapped between the 0DTE Max Pain magnet at 667 and heavy Call resistance at 670-675. A breakdown below 660 targets the multi-expiry support at 650.

outlook.summary: Market sits on a knife's edge at the 600 Resonance level. While 0DTE positive GEX suggests short-term pinning, the massive negative Monthly GEX (-2.42B) and bearish skew (1.30-1.37) indicate significant structural fragility. Dealers are short gamma on the monthly timeframe, meaning a break below 600 could trigger accelerated selling.
